# or it didn't happen

> Event photo collection where guests upload photos straight into the host's
> own cloud storage (Google Drive or Dropbox). No login, no accounts, and no
> photos are ever stored on our servers — only small event metadata in a database.

## What it does

- A host creates an event and connects their own Google Drive or Dropbox.
- The host shares one link with guests.
- Guests upload photos directly into the host's cloud folder, identified by a
  chosen or auto-generated username — no sign-up.
- Everyone sees a live shared gallery; the host can set a cover photo, delete
  photos, and subscribe guests to new-photo push notifications.

## Privacy posture

- Photos go straight to the host's cloud; we never store them.
- OAuth tokens are encrypted (AES-256-GCM) at rest.
- Narrowest permission scope only (Google `drive.file`).

## Key pages

- Home: https://oritdidnthappen.pics/
- Create an event: https://oritdidnthappen.pics/create
- Privacy: https://oritdidnthappen.pics/privacy
- Terms: https://oritdidnthappen.pics/terms
